final:
module binary_counter (
  input clk,
  input reset,
  output reg [3:0] count
);

always @ (posedge clk, posedge reset) begin
  if (reset) begin
    count <= 4'b0;
  end else begin
    count <= count + 1;
  end
end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      count <= count - 1;
    end
  end

endmodule
